markdownRemark.excerpt: So after being coerced into trying a Windows Phone 7 device out by Rudi Grobler and a few others, I’ve taken the leap of faith and placed an order for my HTC…
markdownRemark.html:
So after being coerced into trying a Windows Phone 7 device out by Rudi Grobler and a few others, I’ve taken the leap of faith and placed an order for my HTC Trophy today

Hopefully it will arrive by the middle of next week – more posts to follow soon.

frontmatter.title: The Only Excuse for skipping TDD
